name: regression
description: Outside-in regression test orchestration for polyrepo microservices: discover services, generate docker-compose, seed databases, run Playwright scenarios, report verdict, tear down with -v. Stack-agnostic role-based modeling (Frontend / Backend / Database). Playwright (TypeScript) only - covers browser, HTTP, WebSocket, gRPC. Workspace at .regression/ in a dedicated test repo. Requires core. Codemap is a discovery-time accelerator only.
